allow:
Bash(gh pr edit 61 --title "Add transactions to Observable with simplified notification semantics" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary
- Add callback-based transaction API: `obs.Transaction\(func\(tx *Txn\) { ... }\)`
- Simplify notification semantics - no value tree walking, key hierarchy only
- Change `ChangeCallback` signature from `func\(obs *Observable, key string\)` to `func\(key string\)`
- Move pattern matching to `must.Fnmatch` for fail-fast behavior
- Remove convenience getter methods \(GetMap, GetSlice, etc.\) in favor of `GetValueAs[T]`

## Key Changes
- `obs.Transaction\(func\(tx *Txn\) { ... }\)` - auto-commits on return, `tx.Abort\(\)` to cancel
- Parent key changes override child key changes in deduplication
- Setting a parent key notifies all child subscriptions
- Pattern validation happens at subscription time

## Test plan
- [x] All 68 observable tests pass
- [x] Session tests pass with updated callback signatures

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")
